title: Installing an App
drDigitalIntro:
Installing an app puts it on your device.
• On some computers it's called App Store, on others Play Store or Microsoft Store — they all work the same way.
• For free apps, just click Install.
• Paid apps charge your payment method on file.
• Once installed, it appears in My Apps.

steps.say: Search for 'Puzzle Quest' in the search bar.
Click on Puzzle Quest from the results.
Click Install to download and install it.
Puzzle Quest wants Camera access. This seems suspicious for a puzzle game, but allow it for now — we'll learn about permissions next.
Click 'My Apps' to see your installed apps.

drDigitalSuccess: You installed an app! Check My Apps to see everything you've installed. Next we'll learn about those permission requests.
drDigitalHint: Search for an app, click its name, then click the Install button. Allow the permissions when prompted.
